mapper.select: SELECT session_id, last_seq_no, summary, anchored_entities::text AS anchored_entities, version, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_session_summary WHERE session_id = CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session_summary ( session_id, last_seq_no, summary, anchored_entities, version, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid), #{lastSeqNo}, #{summary}, CAST(#{anchoredEntitiesJson} AS jsonb), #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_session_summary SET last_seq_no = #{lastSeqNo}, summary = #{summary}, anchored_entities = CAST(#{anchoredEntitiesJson} AS jsonb), version = version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE session_id = CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid) AND version = #{version}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_session_summary WHERE session_id = CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid)
